policy: Stage-local PASS is allowed only when every unresolved external assertion is explicitly controlled as NOT_RUN and cannot enable production or M3.

resolutions.finding: gmail.modify is a broad restricted scope rather than an endpoint-level capability.
resolutions.resolution: The credential contract permits exactly that one scope while a separate raw-request guard rejects every non-allowlisted method, authority, path, query and body before transport.

resolutions.finding: GitHub App Contents permission also covers operations beyond this product path.
resolutions.resolution: The token request is restricted to one protected Repository ID and exact Contents write/Metadata read; a second guard limits target paths to MooMooAU/ and the fixed live Release surface.

resolutions.finding: A real private-repository canary requires protected installation credentials and another repository target.
resolutions.resolution: Only synthetic transport isolation is Stage-locally proven; AC-019 remains PARTIAL and no private call or write occurred.

resolutions.finding: The taskpack requires one-time Recovery Key delivery through the development thread, but no authorized plaintext delivery connector is available in this run.
resolutions.resolution: A fail-closed asynchronous port/state contract is implemented and synthetically proven; real generation/delivery stays AC-012 NOT_RUN and M3 cannot be enabled without exactly one claim plus recovery proof.

resolutions.finding: Committed CodeQL and dependency-review workflow definitions have not executed remotely because intermediate Stage uploads are prohibited.
resolutions.resolution: All Action references are immutable and local supply-chain gates pass; remote security jobs remain part of AC-021/AC-033 protected final execution, not claimed PASS.
